Class OpenAiEmbeddingProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.AbstractOpenAiProperties
org.springframework.ai.model.openai.autoconfigure.OpenAiEmbeddingProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.openai.embedding") public class OpenAiEmbeddingProperties extends AbstractOpenAiProperties
